title: Jobs and earnings will dominate the first full week of May. Here's what's ahead
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: Jobs and earnings reports will dominate the first week of May, with key economic data and Fed speeches expected. The April jobs report is anticipated to show st
excerpt: Jobs and earnings reports will dominate the first week of May, with key economic data and Fed speeches expected. The April jobs report is anticipated to show stability after recent fluctuations. Earnings from major companies will also influence market trends.

content.introduction: Jobs and earnings reports will dominate the first week of May, with key economic data and Fed speeches expected. The April jobs report is anticipated to show stability after recent fluctuations. Earnings from major companies will also influence market trends.

By [Karee Venema](https://www.kiplinger.com/author/karee-venema). in [News](https://www.kiplinger.com/news). * [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kiplinger.com%2Finvesting%2Feconomy%2Fthis-weeks-economic-calendar). Incoming [jobs](https://www.kiplinger.com/economic-forecasts/jobs) data is the major theme of this week's economic calendar, starting with hiring and firing numbers for March on Tuesday, continuing with initial jobless claims on Wednesday and ending with the April jobs report on Friday. In the immediate aftermath of the [April Fed meeting](https://www.kiplinger.com/news/live/fed-meeting-updates-and-commentary-april-2026) and Jerome Powell's final press conference as Fed chair, we'll hear from New York Fed President John Williams on Monday and Thursday and Chicago Fed President Austan Goolsbee on Wednesday. [Sign up](https://www.kiplinger.com/newsletter). "We estimate that nonfarm payroll employment was flat in April," a team of Barclays economists led by [Marc Giannoni](https://www.linkedin.com/in/marcpgiannoni/) writes, "following the sharp swings in January (+160k), February (-133k) and March (+178k).". * [Kiplinger's Earnings Calendar](https://www.kiplinger.com/investing/stocks/17494/next-week-earnings-calendar-stocks). * [Kiplinger's Economic Forecasts](https://www.kiplinger.com/economic-forecasts). * [Stock Market Holidays in 2026](https://www.kiplinger.com/investing/stock-market-holidays). * [Stock Market Trading Hours](https://www.kiplinger.com/investing/602886/stock-market-trading-hours). [Karee Venema](https://www.kiplinger.com/author/karee-venema). * [Subscriptions Store](https://www.kiplinger.com/subscription). * [Kiplinger Newsletters](https://www.kiplinger.com/newsletter). * [About Kiplinger](https://www.kiplinger.com/about-us). * [Stock Market Today](https://www.kiplinger.com/tag/closing-bell). * [Economic Forecasts](https://www.kiplinger.com/economic-forecasts). * [Tools and Calculators](https://www.kiplinger.com/tools).
